历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2022 to 2025, the minimum ranking for Physics Category was approximately 42181 → 24886 → 24132 → 35579. In 2025, it shifted back by about 11447 places compared to 2024, mainly due to a significant expansion in enrollment that year. The baseline for 2025 is approximately 35579. The university's enrollment plan for Physics Category in Hubei Province: 246 in 2022, 247 in 2023, 247 in 2024, 352 in 2025 (an increase of 105), and 370 in 2026 (an additional 18 compared to 2025). Two consecutive years of expansion have broadened the competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 211 and Double First-Class university. The Soft Science main ranking has continuously risen from 144th in 2021 to 87th in 2026, reflecting a significant improvement in comprehensive strength and recognition. In 2023, there was a negative public opinion incident related to teacher ethics, but recent reputation has stabilized. Douyin popularity ranking is 32nd (relatively hot), with medium-to-high short video exposure. The 2024 admission score anomaly record shows a continuous increase in cutoff scores, with no signs of gaps. In the fifth round of discipline evaluation, data for disciplines rated A- and above at Hainan University are not included. Advantageous disciplines are characterized by tropical agriculture, forestry, oceanography, and law, which have average relevance to popular engineering majors in Physics Category enrollment, such as computer science, electronic information, and automation.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Engineering majors such as computer science, electronic information/communication, and electrical engineering continue to be highly recommended in 2026 due to social popularity. Hainan University's Physics Category enrollment is mainly in engineering, which attracts some candidates. The number of Physics Category candidates in Hubei Province grew from approximately 147,000 in 2021 to about 250,000 in 2025, with a total of 393,700 candidates in 2026. Estimated at about 248,000 based on the recent Physics Category proportion of approximately 63%, which is roughly stable. The provincial control line for Physics Category undergraduate batch in 2025 is 426 points, with little fluctuation in recent years. Hainan University is located in Haikou, Hainan Province, which is a cross-province application for Hubei candidates, with neutral regional preference factors. The university's enrollment plan in Hubei accounts for a small proportion; in 2025, the 352 Physics Category students represent a small part of the university's total national enrollment.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the significant backward shift in 2025 rankings as a baseline, the continued slight expansion in 2026 (+18 students) slightly broadens competition, the continuous rise in Soft Science rankings attracts more high-quality candidates, and the high social popularity of engineering majors, it is expected that the minimum ranking for Physics Category in 2026 will continue to shift back from the 2025 baseline of 35579, but with a smaller magnitude than in 2025. The predicted minimum ranking is approximately 36471, with a range of 35971 to 36971.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If your ranking is within the predicted range (35971–36971), it is recommended to primarily fill in Tier 2 engineering majors, aim for Tier 1 computer/electronic information majors as a stretch, and use Tier 3 traditional engineering and agriculture/forestry majors as safety options. If your ranking is significantly better than the lower limit of the range (<35971), you can focus on aiming for Tier 1 popular majors. If your ranking is close to the upper limit of the range (>36971), you should mainly rely on Tier 3 safety options.
